title: AAIO Agent Manifest
description: Machine-readable manifest declaring a website's AAIO capabilities, supported protocols, and available endpoints for AI agents.

name.description: Human-readable name of the website or service

description.description: Brief description of the website or service

contact.description: Contact email for AI agent integration support

aaioVersion.description: Version of the AAIO specification this manifest conforms to

capabilities.description: Declared AAIO capabilities organized by the four pillars

discovery.description: Discovery capabilities — how agents find and identify this site

robotsTxt.description: Whether robots.txt includes AI agent directives

llmsTxt.description: Whether llms.txt is available at site root

aiTxt.description: Whether ai.txt is available at site root

agentManifest.description: Whether this AAIO manifest is published (self-referential)

readability.description: Machine-readability capabilities — structured data and data formats

schemaOrg.description: List of Schema.org types implemented (e.g., Product, Offer, Organization)

openApi.description: URL of the OpenAPI specification document

productFeed.description: URL of the machine-readable product/service feed

navigation.description: Navigation capabilities — how agents traverse the site

searchEndpoint.description: URL of the site search API endpoint

categoryEndpoint.description: URL of the category listing API endpoint

breadcrumbs.description: Whether BreadcrumbList Schema.org markup is implemented

transaction.description: Transaction capabilities — how agents can purchase or book

level.description: Transaction maturity level (L0=info only, L3=fully autonomous)

checkoutApi.description: URL of the checkout API endpoint

cartApi.description: URL of the cart management API endpoint

paymentProtocols.description: Supported payment protocols (e.g., acp-v1, stripe, paypal)

authentication.description: Supported authentication methods for transactional operations

tosUrl.description: URL of the terms of service

agentCard.description: URL of the A2A Agent Card (typically /.well-known/agent.json)

rateLimit.description: Rate limiting information for agent traffic

requestsPerMinute.description: Maximum requests per minute for authenticated agents

lastUpdated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this manifest was last updated
